title: Assistant Store Manager - Easyday - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Easyday - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Easyday! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Agra team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Easyday:
Easyday is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Easyday!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
